pi_items.source: setup_azure_devops.ps1 lines 311-313 queries for and creates default repository named 'TailwindTraders', not 'TailwindTraders-Auth'. This is confirmed by address_pr_feedback and ci_pipeline_for_flask_api tasks which also reference 'TailwindTraders' repo. No 'TailwindTraders-Auth' repository is created by any environment setup scripts.

Not created by setup_azure_devops.ps1; environment setup only creates 'main' branch and 'feature/add-search-endpoint' branch (lines 365-451). Task-specific setup_task.ps1 file is missing from task directory, so cannot verify if this branch is created.

File does not exist in /examples/azure_devops_server_env/data/repo_files/. Environment setup script pushes only: app.py, models.py, routes.py, config.py, requirements.txt, Dockerfile, .gitignore, README.md, tests/test_app.py (lines 326-359). Task-specific setup_task.ps1 is missing, so cannot verify if this file is created.

This is a synthetic CVE marker (year 2026 is future date relative to Azure DevOps Server 2022 release). Cannot verify without access to actual hotfix branch content. Missing setup_task.ps1 prevents verification.

Base URL 'http://localhost/DefaultCollection' is detected and hardcoded in setup_azure_devops.ps1 lines 23-26 and install_azure_devops.ps1 line 232. API path construction pattern is confirmed at lines 204, 214, 220, 234, 238 of setup_azure_devops.ps1 using format '{baseUrl}/TailwindTraders/_apis'. Azure DevOps Server 2022 uses API version 7.1 (confirmed throughout scripts).

privileged_info_summary: The gitflow_hotfix_propagation task is configured for a synthetic Azure DevOps Server 2022 Express environment. A critical discrepancy exists: the task metadata claims the repository is 'TailwindTraders-Auth', but the environment setup script (setup_azure_devops.ps1) creates only a 'TailwindTraders' repository. This is corroborated by other Azure DevOps tasks in the same environment (address_pr_feedback, ci_pipeline_for_flask_api) which all reference the 'TailwindTraders' repository. The API base URL 'http://localhost/DefaultCollection/TailwindTraders/_apis' is correctly constructed based on the environment setup. However, critical task-specific files (setup_task.ps1 and export_result.ps1) are missing, preventing verification of whether the hotfix branch 'hotfix/login-security-patch', target file 'src/auth.js', and fix marker 'CVE-2026-9999' are actually created as part of task initialization. The environment uses Azure DevOps Server 2022 Express with API version 7.1 running at http://localhost/DefaultCollection.
